response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no evidence of C programming for UNIX/embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking or security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain complex systems (e.g., GISCollective, CI/CD infrastructure)
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical education
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded or UNIX environments
Zero mention of network security protocols, switch firmware, or embedded device control
No Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement
